visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a medium shot of two women standing in a brightly lit indoor space with plain white walls. The woman on the right wears a black t-shirt with a colorful logo and has a light blue garment draped over her shoulders; she gestures towards the woman on the left. The woman on the left wears a black t-shirt with white text and a black beanie, looking down slightly with a concerned expression. (2) The camera transitions to an extreme close-up of a person's scalp, where a finger points to visible white flakes of dandruff among dark hair strands. (3) The scene shifts back to a medium shot of the woman in the purple shawl, who is now speaking directly to the camera with animated facial expressions and hand gestures, explaining something. (4) A graphic transition introduces the product: two bottles of 'AROMASE' shampoo are displayed against a clean, white and orange background. (5) The woman in the purple shawl holds a dark green bottle of '5α JUNIPER' liquid shampoo close to the camera, smiling and pointing to the label while the other woman stands in the background. (6) Close-up shots of the product labels follow, specifically focusing on the 'Dry' and 'Oily' variants of the shampoo bottles. (7) The woman demonstrates the application of a scalp spray, parting her hair and applying the product directly to her scalp while looking into the camera. (8) The final scene shows three women standing together, smiling and laughing as they hold the products, conveying a sense of satisfaction and resolution.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 為什麼要戴帽子. (2) [Subtitle]: 因為就最近可能換季吧. (3) [Subtitle]: 你看我有那個頭皮屑... (4) [Subtitle]: 你沒洗頭喔. (5) [Subtitle]: 我有. (6) [Subtitle]: 我超愛乾淨. (7) [Subtitle]: 我每天都有洗好不好. (8) [Subtitle]: 可是. (9) [Subtitle]: 沒辦法你看這裡. (10) [Subtitle]: 都有這種乾屑. [Variety]: 超多屑屑. (11) [Slogan]: 換季癢, 染燙後敏感, 有頭皮屑. (12) [Subtitle]: 除了頭皮容易乾癢之外. (13) [Subtitle]: 如果女生有那種燙染. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後漂之後的話. (15) [Subtitle]: 容易敏感就會有乾屑. [Variety]: 容易敏感 -> 就會有乾屑. (16) [Subtitle]: 就容易會有雪花的問題. (17) [Subtitle]: 我跟你說我介紹你那個艾瑪絲頭皮養護組. [Logo]: HAHABABY. (18) [Slogan]: 艾瑪絲頭皮養護組. (19) [Variety]: 第一步. (20) [Subtitle]: 使用艾瑪絲捷利爾頭皮進化液. (21) [Slogan]: 艾瑪絲捷利爾頭皮進化液. (22) [Variety]: 定期軟化厚重角質. (23) [Variety]: 去除堆積油垢. (24) [Subtitle]: 這個我知道啊. (25) [Subtitle]: 我用過大JJ的. (26) [Subtitle]: 涼涼的很舒服餒. (27) [Variety]: 第二步. (28) [Subtitle]: 用最新款的捷利爾去屑洗髮精. (29) [Slogan]: 捷利爾去屑洗髮精. (30) [Variety]: 細雪花, 乾頭癢. (31) [Variety]: 溫和進化. (32) [Variety]: 保濕舒敏. (33) [Variety]: 大雪花, 油頭癢. (34) [Variety]: 100%不含藥, 也能做到強效去屑喔. (35) [Variety]: 第三步. (36) [Subtitle]: 就是用我們的草本強健養髮精華液. (37) [Slogan]: 草本強健養髮液. (38) [Subtitle]: 你連續使用呢就能調理頭皮. (39) [Subtitle]: 達到舒緩效果. (40) [Subtitle]: 每天早晚噴灑於頭皮就OK啦. (41) [Subtitle]: 來都給你都給你啊. (42) [Subtitle]: 屑屑老闆娘~ (43) [Subtitle]: 不"屑"不"屑". (44) [Subtitle]: 用對的商品才能真正讓頭皮放鬆.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main characters interacting throughout, 1 additional female character appears in the final scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has her hair in two small buns with a purple shawl over a black t-shirt and denim shorts. The other woman wears a black beanie and a black t-shirt with long sheer sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist indoor studio with solid white walls and bright, even artificial lighting. Some medical/skincare product graphics are overlaid at times.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female conversation begins with bright, high-pitched vocal tones. An upbeat, major-key electronic BGM starts immediately, featuring a strong percussive beat. (2) A 'ding' SFX triggers as the dialogue focuses on a specific visual detail. The speech rate is fast and enthusiastic. (3) A 'whoosh' transition sound marks a shift in the narrative. The primary speaker's voice becomes slightly more instructive but maintains high arousal. (4) 'Pop' and 'bubble' sound effects punctuate the introduction of product names. The BGM continues steadily in the background. (5) Each instructional step is marked by a rhythmic percussive hit or a cartoonish SFX. The vocal intensity remains consistent. (6) The final phase features layered female voices laughing and cheering, with a slight swell in the BGM volume before a clean fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Identification -> Solution (3 Steps) -> Results & CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement for AROMASE scalp care products. It uses a relatable social scenario (dandruff embarrassment) to identify a problem, then provides a clear, three-step solution using specific products, concluding with positive emotional reinforcement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on demonstrating and praising AROMASE products, showing clear labels and detailed usage instructions.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing styles with heavy text overlays and SFX to maintain high viewer engagement throughout the product pitch.
